outcomes.198: All eight candidates retain a 24-26 input giant Einsum and fail the structural gate.
outcomes.200: The cost-344 candidate fails known examples; both cost-345 known passes use a one-element bias for a two-output-channel Conv and are UB rejects.
outcomes.201: All three cheaper known passes fail fresh data: r01 and r02 are 0/500 in both modes; r03 is 4290/5000 in both modes.
outcomes.219: r04 fails known data; all other cheaper known passes fail fresh data, with r01/r02/r03 only 32/500, 9/500, and 7/500 and r05 417/500 in both modes.
outcomes.302: r01 costs 52355; r02 is executable-byte equivalent to the baseline after metadata removal and obtains 159 only by falsifying one value_info dimension.
outcomes.343: Both cost-172 known passes fail fresh data: r01 is 4975/5000 and r02 is 497/500 in both modes.
